response.justification: Candidate has extensive software engineering experience (20+ years) but minimal C++ exposure — only a brief stint at National Instruments (2000-2001) writing C/C++ components. The bulk of recent work is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang full-stack and web/GIS platforms. No evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443/SDL practice, MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA protocols, or message-broker-based large-scale C++ systems. Resume timeline also has overlapping date ranges that warrant scrutiny.
strengths: Long, broad engineering tenure across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Has touched concurrent/low-latency systems (DLang microservices handling high RPS)
Comfortable with multiple languages and dev-ops/CI/CD practices
concerns: Almost no recent C++/STL hands-on work — primary stack is TS/Node/DLang
No demonstrated industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or SDL experience
Missing required protocol/IoT exposure (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
